category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Marshall Islands.

title.en: China-to-Marshall Islands EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入马绍尔群岛：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入馬紹爾群島：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Marshall Islands Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities / Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities / Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)requirements, 120/240 V 60 Hz grid adaptation, SAE J1772 and CCS1 connector expectations, UL-direction EVSE safety, FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局 / 相关监管机构 / 马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）要求、120/240 V 60 Hz电网适配、SAE J1772和CCS1接口预期、UL方向EVSE安全、FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000电磁兼容证据、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局 / 相關監管機構 / 馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）要求、120/240 V 60 Hz電網適配、SAE J1772和CCS1接口預期、UL方向EVSE安全、FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000電磁相容證據、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering the Marshall Islands, the fundamental gaps are 120/240 V 60 Hz electrical revalidation against China's 220/380 V 50 Hz domestic baseline, hardware conversion from GB/T 20234 to SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC, UL-direction EVSE safety evidence such as UL 2594 or UL 2202, FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence for electronic and networked equipment, Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)site connection approval, and hurricane-prone island installation resilience. A Marshall Islands-specific mandatory EVSE certification route could not be confirmed from the provided sources as of 2026-06-15; exporters should verify the current Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities, Marshalls Energy Company (MEC), customs, and project requirements before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入马绍尔群岛时，根本差距包括：相对中国220/380 V 50 Hz国内基线，须按120/240 V 60 Hz重新验证电气设计；接口须从GB/T 20234硬件转换为交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1；须准备UL方向EVSE安全证据，如UL 2594或UL 2202；电子及联网设备须准备FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000电磁兼容证据；并取得马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）现场接入批准，同时考虑飓风多发海岛环境的安装韧性。截至2026年6月15日，未能从所给来源确认马绍尔群岛专门针对EVSE的强制认证路径；出口商应在发货前核实现行马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局、马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局、马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）、海关及项目要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入馬紹爾群島時，根本差距包括：相對中國220/380 V 50 Hz國內基線，須按120/240 V 60 Hz重新驗證電氣設計；接口須從GB/T 20234硬體轉換為交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1；須準備UL方向EVSE安全證據，如UL 2594或UL 2202；電子及聯網設備須準備FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000電磁相容證據；並取得馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）現場接入批准，同時考慮颶風多發海島環境的安裝韌性。截至2026年6月15日，未能從所給來源確認馬紹爾群島專門針對EVSE的強制認證路徑；出口商應在發貨前核實現行馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局、馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局、馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）、海關及項目要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities scope determination, Ministry of Works, Infrastructure & Utilities approval, Marshalls Energy Company (MEC)interconnection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, hurricane-resilience design, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Marshall Islands conformity, utility, electrical-code, telecom, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局适用范围裁定、马绍尔群岛公共事业监管和竞争局批准、马绍尔群岛电力照明公司（MEC）并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定、抗飓风设计或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行马绍尔群岛合格评定、电力、电气规范、通信、海关及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局適用範圍裁定、馬紹爾群島公共事業監管和競爭局批准、馬紹爾群島電力照明公司（MEC）併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、抗颶風設計或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬紹爾群島合格評定、電力、電氣規範、通訊、海關及項目要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
